targets.query: from(bucket: "kelonia") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature") |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${nid}" == "" then true else r.nid == "${nid}") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "kelonia") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidite") |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${nid}" == "" then true else r.nid == "${nid}") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "kelonia") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vibration") |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${nid}" == "" then true else r.nid == "${nid}") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "kelonia") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tension") |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${nid}" == "" then true else r.nid == "${nid}") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
